# LithosClient

Async MCP-over-SSE client to the Lithos server (task/note CRUD, event stream, dead-session recovery).

**Tier:** Foundation

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos_loom.lithos_client` | XL | 5 | 0 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.lithos_client`
- class `Task` ‚Äî A Lithos task as returned by ``lithos_task_list``, ``lithos_task_status``, and ``lithos_task_get`` (lithos#294).
- class `Note` ‚Äî A full Lithos KB document as returned by ``lithos_read``.
- class `NoteSummary` ‚Äî Lightweight ``Note`` projection returned by ``lithos_list``.
- class `WriteResult` ‚Äî Result envelope from :meth:`LithosClient.note_write`.
- class `LithosClient` ‚Äî MCP-over-SSE client for the Lithos server.
